title: ToolkitSelectItem
description: ToolkitSelectItem: For each toolkit in BHoM, allocate a boolean flag for whether it should appear in search results or not.

Toolkit.description: The name of the toolkit that this item refers to.

Include.description: Determine whether to include the toolkit in search results or not.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
